stale_references.recommendation: Replace all 'context-intelligence' references with 'use-hivemind-context' in skill-authoring examples.

broken_internal_links.description: No broken internal reference file paths found in SKILL.md files
broken_internal_links.verification_method: Extracted all 'references/*.md' patterns from SKILL.md files and verified each referenced file exists on disk
broken_internal_links.result: PASS - all internal reference paths resolve correctly
broken_internal_links.note: Initial scan produced false positives due to regex capturing source file paths instead of content patterns. Re-verified with targeted grep confirmed zero broken links.

missing_cross_references.evidence: hivemind-patterns defines pattern catalog. hivemind-refactor references patterns but sister skills. But patterns SKILL.md does not reference refactor back.
hivemind-system-debug references codemap for return-to-codemap decision. But codemap does not reference debug.
missing_cross_references.recommendation: Add unidirectional reference in codemap (debug is a downstream consumer of codemap output)

summary.most_critical_finding: SR-01: 'context-intelligence' referenced as example skill name in 6 skill-authoring reference files (27+ line locations). This is a pervasive stale reference that actively misleads skill authors into using a non-existent skill name.
recommended_priority_order: 1. SR-01 (context-intelligence) — pervasive stale reference in skill-authoring examples
2. TI-05 (depth skill terminology) — 4 variants for same concept
3. TI-06 (verification-before-completion duplication) — identical file in 7 skills
4. OR-01 through OR-04 — 4 skills with 10+ flat reference files needing sub-organization
5. SR-04, SR-05 (artifact stale refs) — delegation artifacts reference non-existent skills
6. MX-01 through MX-08 — 8 missing cross-references between related skills
